Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Lead

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Lead
public class Lead extends SObject

Java class for Lead complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Lead">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AcceptedEventRelations" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
